title: Elite Car Care — Premium Business Website

requirements.text: Apply a sleek, luxurious visual theme throughout the site: dark background (near-black #0A0A0A / #111111), gold/amber accent color (#D4AF37 / #F5C842), off-white text, and a premium sans-serif typeface (e.g., Inter or Montserrat). All sections must use consistent spacing, smooth scroll behavior, and subtle entrance animations (fade-in/slide-up on scroll). The design must be fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints.

quotes: Sleek, modern, and luxurious design aesthetic
Dark color scheme with gold/yellow accents to convey premium quality

acceptanceCriteria: Dark background and gold accents are applied consistently across all sections
Text is legible with sufficient contrast on all backgrounds
Smooth scroll is enabled site-wide
Sections animate in on scroll (fade or slide)
Layout is responsive and usable on mobile (≤ 375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1280px+)

requirements.text: Build a full-screen Hero section at the top of the page featuring: the business name 'Elite Car Care' in large, bold typography; the tagline 'Premium Auto Detailing & Car Care Services'; a prominent CTA button labeled 'Book Now' that smooth-scrolls to the Contact/Booking section; and a full-width background using the generated hero image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.jpg) with a dark overlay for legibility.

quotes: Hero Section: Eye-catching header with the business name 'Elite Car Care', a tagline like 'Premium Auto Detailing & Car Care Services', and a prominent Call-to-Action button

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section occupies at least 90vh on desktop
Business name, tagline, and CTA button are all visible and styled with gold accents
'Book Now' button smooth-scrolls to the contact form section
Background image has a dark overlay ensuring text readability

requirements.text: Build a Services section listing the following six services in a responsive card grid: Full Detail (Interior + Exterior), Exterior Wash & Wax, Interior Deep Clean, Paint Correction & Protection, Ceramic Coating, Engine Bay Cleaning. Each card should display a relevant icon, the service name, and a short description. Cards should have a hover effect (gold border highlight or subtle lift).

quotes: Services Section: Display services such as: Full Detail (interior + exterior), Exterior Wash & Wax, Interior Deep Clean, Paint Correction & Protection, Ceramic Coating, Engine Bay Cleaning

acceptanceCriteria: All six services are displayed
Each card has an icon, name, and description
Cards are arranged in a responsive grid (3 columns desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile)
Hover effect applies a gold accent

requirements.text: Build a 'Why Choose Us' section highlighting four key differentiators in a visually distinct layout (e.g., icon + heading + description blocks): Experienced Professionals, Premium Products, Satisfaction Guaranteed, Mobile Service Available. Use gold icons and a dark card or alternating layout.

quotes: Why Choose Us Section: Highlights like 'Experienced Professionals', 'Premium Products', 'Satisfaction Guaranteed', 'Mobile Service Available'

acceptanceCriteria: All four highlights are displayed with icons, headings, and short descriptions
Section is clearly labeled 'Why Choose Us'
Icons use gold accent color
Layout is responsive

requirements.text: Build a Gallery / Before & After section displaying a grid of car detailing images using the generated gallery images (gallery-1.dim_800x600.jpg through gallery-6.dim_800x600.jpg). The section heading should read 'Our Work'. Images should display in a responsive masonry or uniform grid with a hover overlay effect showing a gold tint or zoom effect.

quotes: Gallery/Before & After Section: A visually appealing photo gallery section with sample car detailing images (use placeholder images)

acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 gallery images are displayed
Images are arranged in a responsive grid
Hover effect applies a gold overlay or zoom
Section is labeled 'Our Work'

requirements.text: Build a Pricing section with three service tier cards: Basic, Standard, and Premium. Each card should list the tier name, price, and a bullet list of included services. The recommended tier (Standard) should be visually emphasized with a gold border or badge. Each card includes a 'Book Now' CTA button that scrolls to the contact form.

quotes: Pricing Section: Clean pricing cards for different service tiers (Basic, Standard, Premium)

acceptanceCriteria: Three pricing cards are displayed side by side on desktop, stacked on mobile
Each card lists tier name, price, and included services
Standard tier is visually highlighted
'Book Now' button on each card scrolls to the contact form

requirements.text: Build a Testimonials section displaying at least four customer reviews. Each testimonial card should show a star rating (5 stars in gold), a review quote, and the customer's name. Use a horizontally scrollable carousel or a 2×2 grid layout on desktop.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 4 testimonials are displayed
Each testimonial shows a star rating, quote, and name
Stars are rendered in gold
Layout is responsive

requirements.text: Build a Contact / Booking section with a styled form containing the following fields: Full Name (text), Email Address (email), Phone Number (tel), Service Selection (dropdown with the 6 service options), Preferred Date (date picker), and a Message/Notes textarea. Include a submit button labeled 'Request a Quote'. On submit, display a success confirmation message. Store submitted bookings in the backend.

quotes: Contact/Booking Section: Contact form with fields for name, email, phone, service selection, and preferred date

acceptanceCriteria: Form contains all six specified fields
Form validates required fields before submission
On successful submission, a confirmation message is shown to the user
Submitted booking data is persisted in the backend canister
Form is responsive and styled with the dark/gold theme

requirements.text: Build a Footer section containing: the Elite Car Care logo/name with a short tagline, navigation links to each page section, social media icon links (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X), hours of operation (Mon–Fri 8am–6pm, Sat 9am–5pm, Sun Closed), and a business address. Style with a very dark background and gold accents.

quotes: Footer: Business info, social media links, hours of operation, address

acceptanceCriteria: Footer contains business name/tagline, nav links, social icons, hours, and address
All section navigation links in the footer work correctly
Footer is responsive (stacked columns on mobile)
Styled consistently with the dark/gold theme

requirements.text: Implement a sticky navigation bar at the top of the page that includes the 'Elite Car Care' logo/name and anchor links to all major sections (Home, Services, Why Us, Gallery, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact). The navbar should have a transparent background on the hero and transition to a solid dark background on scroll. Include a mobile hamburger menu.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is sticky and always visible
Navbar transitions from transparent to dark on scroll
All anchor links scroll smoothly to the correct sections
A hamburger menu is shown on mobile with a working drawer/dropdown

requirements.text: Implement a Motoko backend actor that stores booking form submissions. The actor should expose a `submitBooking` update function accepting: name, email, phone, service, preferredDate, and message fields. It should also expose a `getBookings` query function returning all stored bookings (for admin purposes).

quotes: Contact/Booking Section: Contact form with fields for name, email, phone, service selection, and preferred date

acceptanceCriteria: `submitBooking` stores the provided booking data in stable memory
`getBookings` returns all stored bookings as an array
All fields (name, email, phone, service, preferredDate, message) are persisted
Backend compiles without errors

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor file
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not use external image hosting — all images must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/
No authentication (Internet Identity) is required for this build

required: A dramatic full-width hero background showing a gleaming luxury black car being detailed at night with dramatic studio lighting and bokeh background (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.jpg)
Close-up of a car exterior being hand-waxed to a mirror shine with warm golden lighting (gallery-1.dim_800x600.jpg)
Pristine black car interior with leather seats, clean dashboard, and soft ambient lighting (gallery-2.dim_800x600.jpg)
Car paint correction in progress under bright workshop lights showing swirl-free reflective finish (gallery-3.dim_800x600.jpg)
Ceramic coating being applied to a dark luxury car hood under professional lighting (gallery-4.dim_800x600.jpg)
Spotless engine bay of a high-performance car after professional cleaning (gallery-5.dim_800x600.jpg)
Before-and-after split of a car door panel showing dull paint on left and mirror polish on right (gallery-6.dim_800x600.jpg)
